<!--
PR title must be a conventional commit — e.g.:
  feat: add dracula theme variant
  fix: keep cursor on-screen when preview toggles
  docs: clarify NO_COLOR behavior

Supported types: feat, fix, perf, refactor, docs, test, build, ci, chore, revert
-->

## What

<!-- One sentence describing the change. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation — what problem does this solve? Link any issue it closes. -->

## How to test

<!-- Commands, steps, or scenarios a reviewer can use to verify this. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] `go vet ./...` + `gofmt -l .` are clean
- [ ] PR title is a conventional commit
